summary: Removing the word 'Senior' from the Projects section/page of the application.

existing_features.title: Revert all frontend source files to their Version 12 state by undoing all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16, including modifications to pages (Home.tsx, About.tsx, and all other pages), components, hooks, styles, and configuration files.

Revert all frontend source files to their Version 12 state by undoing all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16. This includes all pages (Home.tsx, About.tsx, Blog.tsx, BlogPost.tsx, Contact.tsx, Experience.tsx, Projects.tsx, Services.tsx, Skills.tsx, Testimonials.tsx, NotFound.tsx), all admin pages (Dashboard.tsx, BlogManagement.tsx, CategoriesManagement.tsx, ExperienceManagement.tsx, Help.tsx, LeadsManagement.tsx, ProjectsManagement.tsx, SeoManagement.tsx, ServicesManagement.tsx, SkillsManagement.tsx, SocialLinksManagement.tsx, TestimonialsManagement.tsx), all non-immutable components (AdminGuard.tsx, AdminSidebar.tsx, Footer.tsx, Layout.tsx, LoginButton.tsx, Navigation.tsx, ProfileSetup.tsx, SEOHead.tsx, ThemeToggle.tsx), all non-immutable hooks (useActorWrapper.ts, useQueries.ts), all styles (frontend/src/index.css, frontend/index.css), and configuration files (tailwind.config.js, frontend/index.html, frontend/src/App.tsx). Do not modify any immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, and frontend/src/components/ui.

Restore frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx to its exact Version 12 state using the user-provided Version 12 source code, undoing all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16. Leave all other files untouched.

Restore frontend/src/pages/About.tsx to its exact Version 12 state using the user-provided Version 12 source code, undoing all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16. Leave all other files untouched.

new_feature_requests.summary: Restore the application to the exact state of Version 12, reverting all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16 (inclusive) across both the frontend and backend.
Generate a migration.mo file if the backend state shape changed between Version 12 and the current version (16), ensuring stable upgrade without data loss when the canister is redeployed.
Restore only Home.tsx and About.tsx to their Version 12 state using the user-provided source code, leaving all other files untouched.

Restore backend/main.mo to its exact Version 12 state by reverting all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16, including any schema changes, new endpoints, modified logic, or removed functionality. The frontend must remain completely untouched.

Generate a migration.mo file to safely migrate any existing canister state from the current version (16) schema back to the Version 12 schema without data loss when the canister is upgraded and redeployed.

Generate backend/migration.mo that safely migrates existing canister stable state from the Version 16 schema back to the Version 12 schema. The migration must handle all stable variable shape differences between the two versions — including any added, removed, or restructured fields in types such as BlogPost, Project, Service, Skill, Lead, SeoSetting, SocialLink, Experience, and User — so that when the canister is upgraded and redeployed with the Version 12 main.mo, all existing data is preserved without data loss or deserialization errors.
Remove the word 'Senior' wherever it appears in the Projects section/page of the application.

In frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx, remove every occurrence of the word 'Senior' (case-sensitive and case-insensitive variants) from all static text, labels, headings, and any hardcoded strings displayed in the Projects page and its project cards. Do not alter data fetched dynamically from the backend.
